parameters.name: top_campaigns_by_cost
parameters.description: Lists the campaigns with the highest spend during a specified date range. Useful to analyze where the budget is going.

parameters.name: top_campaigns_by_conversions
parameters.description: Lists the campaigns with the highest conversions and best CPA.

parameters.name: underperforming_keywords
parameters.description: Identifies keywords with high CTR but zero conversions (money burners).

parameters.name: conversion_trends
parameters.description: Returns a day-by-day or week-by-week trend of conversions and spend to identify sudden drops.

parameters.name: anomaly_detection
parameters.description: Returns daily campaign stats for the last 30 days including weekday info (segments.day_of_week). Use this data to detect anomalies by comparing each day against the average of the same weekday. Includes: impressions, clicks, cost, conversions, CTR, cost_per_conversion.

parameters.name: get_recommendations
parameters.description: Retrieves auto-generated optimization recommendations from Google Ads (e.g. KEYWORD, BUDGET).

parameters.name: apply_recommendation
parameters.description: Applies a specific Google Ads recommendation.

value.recommendationId: ={{ $fromAI('recommendationId', 'The resourceName or ID of the recommendation.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: dismiss_recommendation
parameters.description: Dismisses a specific Google Ads recommendation.

value.recommendationId: ={{ $fromAI('recommendationId', 'The resourceName or ID of the recommendation.', 'string') }}

parameters.jsCode:
if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row }));
